name: Gary Peters
subject: Too many people across the country don't know how they'll put food on the table
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
Trump's assault on low-income Americans:
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da920/5721a3ed/70740f7a/efb4c85/3425317807/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friend,

Too many people across the country are, sadly, starting the year in fear of how they'll put food on the table in a few months time - and it's thanks to Donald Trump's proposed cuts to the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP).
This assault on those with low incomes could eliminate SNAP benefits for nearly 700,000 Americans already living in poverty starting in April - folks who will only be pushed into hunger, not pushed toward greater chances of employment as Trump would have us believe.
As a matter of fact, Congress came together to _protect_ SNAP benefits when passing the Farm Bill in 2018. **But now, President Trump has bypassed Congress, and I need supporters like you to join me in speaking out against this cruelty.**
**I 've signed on to a petition calling for the Trump administration to reverse its rule change and protect SNAP benefits. [Click here to add your name now and stand against plunging thousands of Americans into hunger. My goal is to get 7,500 signers before midnight.](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/support-snap/?code=Peters&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk224-ja-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FSNAP-Peters%3Fcode%3Djtk224-ja-nd")**
| | [Sign the petition](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/support-snap/?code=Peters&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk224-ja-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FSNAP-Peters%3Fcode%3Djtk224-ja-nd")
---
The simple and harsh truth about Trump's policy change is that it will harm the people who are most in need of help. That's no way to govern, and we've got to stand up to this cruelty. I appreciate you taking the time to speak out and fight back with me.
Gary

name: Michael Bennet
subject: this is The Real Deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team, as we enter this election year, we have an historic opportunity to make lasting progress for families and workers across the country.

In contrast to other candidates, the comprehensive agenda we released today is progressive, fully paid for, and widely popular among the American people.

[It's The Real Deal:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba859/134673f2/8ad81ca/69976ac2/4179682944/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_010220_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000") It will make lasting progress for you and your family. This is the political and policy blueprint that should guide our priorities for the next 20 years.

For too many decades, we have failed to invest in our country and our kids' futures.

We have spent $5 trillion on tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans and another $5.6 trillion fighting wars in the Middle East. Donald Trump has made matters worse by passing a tax bill that benefited the wealthy and corporations and increased economic inequality.

[Our country would look very different if we passed The Real Deal:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba859/134673f2/8ad81ca/69976ac2/4179682944/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_010220_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

* Every three- and four-year old would have access to preschool.
* Every family with kids would receive at least $3,000 a year, paid out monthly.
* 40% of kids currently living in poverty no longer would be.
* Every worker would have paid family and medical leave.
* The 70% of Americans who graduate from high school but don't earn a four-year degree would have the training and opportunities needed to earn a living wage.
* Millions of people would have access to new jobs in clean energy and infrastructure.
* 11 million undocumented immigrants would have a pathway to citizenship and the chance to contribute even more meaningfully to our economy.

[The Real Deal would cost about $6 trillion over the next decade--less than one-fifth of the cost of Medicare for All _alone._](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba859/134673f2/8ad81ca/69976ac2/4179682944/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_010220_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

The policy failures of the Trump administration can't be fixed with empty promises of free stuff.

There is a better way, team.

With The Real Deal, we can turn away from the politics of empty promises and can't-do rhetoric. We can choose to invest in our country and our future.

We have an historic opportunity to reimagine a politics that finally makes lasting progress for you, your family, and millions of Americans. This is The Real Deal. Join us.

Together,

Michael

---
| Michael has been a pragmatic leader, fighting to overcome the dysfunction in Washington with a proven track record of creating enduring solutions to our nation's greatest challenges.

We can't let this election just become bickering over empty promises and policies we can't pass. We have to ignite our base while also winning back the places we lost in 2016. We've got to make sure everyone knows they have a president who's more concerned about the next generation than the next tweet.

[That's why Michael is running. He knows how to bring people together to make sustainable progress.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba859/134673f2/8ad81ca/69976ac2/4179682944/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_010220_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000") [Read The Real Deal agenda](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba859/134673f2/8ad81ca/69976ac1/4179682944/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://michaelbennet.com/realdeal/") [and chip in now to join us in this fight today:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba859/134673f2/8ad81ca/69976ac2/4179682944/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_010220_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

| As one of the few candidates of color left in this race, I am fighting with everything I've got to secure my spot on the next debate stage. But the deadline is just over a week away, and I can't do it alone. We're at a sad moment in this race, team. **LAST MONTH:** Kamala Harris suspended her campaign for president. **THIS MORNING:** Julian Castro announced his departure from the race. **NOW:** What started out as the most diverse field of candidates running for president in our nation's history is quickly becoming one that does not reflect the rich diversity of our party and of our country. **As one of the few candidates of color left in this race, I am fighting with everything I 've got to secure my spot on the next debate stage. name: Yang2020 HQ
subject: Pretty incredible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
An overview of the last quarter of 2019

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5444%2E377263%2EdTQpfA) Yang Gang --

Between October 1 and December 31, we did something pretty incredible together.

We positioned ourselves as a top-tier campaign with a top-tier candidate and it’s all thanks to you. **The proof?_We raised over $16.5 million in the fourth quarter -- by far our best fundraising haul yet._**

Through conversations with friends and family, knocking on doors, making phone calls, campaign stops in the early states, TV appearances, advertising, debate performances, and more, we grew this campaign to a place many said wouldn’t be possible.

And now the toughest test is ahead of us. There are 32 days until the Iowa caucuses, 40 days until the New Hampshire primary, and 51 days until the Nevada caucuses. **In the next two months, 40% of the delegates this cycle will be awarded.**

Plus, we still need three polls at 5% to qualify for the January debate.

[Show Andrew that you’ll stand with him through Iowa, New Hampshire, Nevada and all the way to the Oval Office. Add your name and show the world that we won’t slow down. The Yang Gang is here to win.](https://act.yang2020.com/sign/email-january-petition-20200102?source=email-20200102pm-all&t=6&akid=5444%2E377263%2EdTQpfA) | [Add Your Name](https://act.yang2020.com/sign/email-january-petition-20200102?source=email-20200102pm-all&t=7&akid=5444%2E377263%2EdTQpfA)
---
In the last 9 days alone, we took in nearly 100,000 contributions from all 50 states plus D.C., three military ZIP codes, American Samoa, Guam, Puerto Rico, the Northern Marianas, and the Virgin Islands. And in the final 48 hours of the quarter, we brought in over 10,000 new donors.

**Here’s where that leaves us for the lifetime of the campaign:**

* Donations from 95% of the counties in America
* Average Contribution: $30
* Over 1,000,000 total contributions

Thank you for everything you’ve done to get us where we are.

A few months ago, most people had never heard of Andrew Yang. And we started this campaign with none of the political infrastructure that most of our opponents enjoy. But, with your help, we built a true grassroots movement from the ground up -- and the results speak for themselves.

With the Iowa caucuses just one month away, it’s crunch time for us, and we can’t afford to slow down.

[Will you show Andrew you’ll stand with him through Iowa, New Hampshire, Nevada, and all the way to the White House? Add your name now. ](https://act.yang2020.com/sign/email-january-petition-20200102?source=email-20200102pm-all&t=8&akid=5444%2E377263%2EdTQpfA)
[Add Your Name](https://act.yang2020.com/sign/email-january-petition-20200102?source=email-20200102pm-all&t=9&akid=5444%2E377263%2EdTQpfA)
---
Thank you,

Yang2020 HQ
**Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21157?t=2&akid=5444%2E377263%2EdTQpfA)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=3&akid=5444%2E377263%2EdTQpfA) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=5444%2E377263%2EdTQpfA) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

Happy New Year!

Thanks to you, 2020 is off to a great start! Not only did supporters like you help us to reach our end-of-year goal, but we well-surpassed it. THANK YOU!

In a few weeks, the Tennessee General Assembly will reconvene for another session of "law-making." subject: This is the year we re-elect Mark Warner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
2020 is here.
|
---
| | Derek,

2019 is old news. 2020 is here. **This is the year we re-elect Mark Warner.** [**Will you pledge to help send Mark back to the Senate in one (or more) of these ways in 2020?**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d6ec/53d9897e/53af48f6/1c89cb7e/729209226/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-mark2020?refcode=20200104_e_1_fl") | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d6ec/53d9897e/53af48f6/1c89cb7e/729209226/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-mark2020?refcode=20200104_e_1_fl")
---
Mark needs **_you_** on Team Warner. He cares deeply about the future of our Commonwealth and is ready to defend our recent progress, but he can't do it all on his own.

With multiple GOP candidates vying for the chance to take down Mark, we'll need to fight for this seat harder than ever before.

Consider what we're up against:
* Pro-Trump dark money groups dumping **_millions of dollars_** in negative ads against Virginia Democrats up for re-election in November
* Donald Trump placing his 2020 campaign headquarters in VA and then going around saying that **_" Virginia is in play"_**
* The Trump Campaign holding **_over 82_** Trump Victory Initiative events across VA in 2019 alone
* FiveThirtyEight analyzing 2020 Senate races and rating Virginia's partisan lean as only **narrowly Democratic (_D_ +_0.1_)**

Above all else, we must remember that our Commonwealth is known for its political volatility. Mark knows this better than anyone: **He won his first Senate election in 2008 by 31% but only beat Ed Gillespie by _0.8%_ just six years later.

[I'm all in for sending Mark back to the Senate to fight for Virginia. Are you? subject: 8 Things I Will Do to Reduce Mass Shootings.
body:
Dear Peter,

The White Settlement Church shooting, which occurred just a few hours' drive from our district, is yet another tragic reason why Congress must demand action on gun violence (http://marcfloresforcongress.com/issues?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=f07ea5a70b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_02_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-f07ea5a70b-32267927) .

Here are 8 things I will do as your Congressman to reduce mass shootings.
1. Demand a review of red flag laws.
2. Fight to require background checks for every firearm sale in partnership with Moms Demand Action.
3. Ban weapons of war.
4. Fight for legislation which requires and ensures safe gun storage.
5. Close the "boyfriend" loophole, and ensure that historically abusive partners in relationships do not have access to firearms.
6. Require waiting periods for firearm purchases in order to prevent rash and violent behavior.
7. Implement programs which provide and promote firearm education and safety.
8. Provide support services for people impacted by gun violence, and for those whose mental health challenges may lead them to violent actions.

Thousands of people die every year from gun violence, be it intentional or unintentional, homicidal or suicidal. It’s time for us to act, and make our community safer.

That's one of my most important resolutions for 2020.

Can we count on you to support our campaign? Please donate below (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=f07ea5a70b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_02_05_50&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-f07ea5a70b-32267927) .

A few days before Tuesday's quarterly FEC fundraising report, we leveled with you.

We shared that we were still a good chunk behind our third quarter fundraising and set a goal of $20 million goal by December 31, which was what we'd need to raise to keep our plans on track.

Well today, I'm excited to share some great news with you. Thanks to supporters like you who stepped up and chipped in, **we beat our goal and raised more than $21.2 million in the fourth quarter of 2019**. And we saw a strong surge of support at the end -- **over $1.5 million came in on the last day of the year alone, our best fundraising day to date**.

Team Warren is ready to dream big, fight hard, and win. Thank you, thank you, thank you.

I'll dig deeper into the numbers in just a sec, but first, I've got a quick and important plug. We hit our goal for 2019, but it's 2020 now, and we've got new, must-hit daily targets. **Money we raise every day in January will get sent straight into connecting with voters and caucus-goers, and the first votes are just a few weeks away**.

**[We can't slow down. Please make a contribution if you can right now to keep fighting by Elizabeth's side.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b8e1/45c30650/1eb4b690e/66fc74c1/2110498876/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjA5Rl9STFRfU1RSX0NfMjAyMDAxMDNfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN09F_RLT_STR_C_20200103_V1S1_P")**

>
Okay, back to the numbers!
* More than **443,000 people** made almost **900,000 donations** to help raise over **$21.2 million** in October, November, and December
* Our average contribution was just $23
* That means in 2019, **nearly 1 million donors** gave more than **2.7 million contributions** to raise more than **$71 million**.

_**Who Made It Happen?**_

Grassroots donors.

Elizabeth didn't host any private events to raise money from wealthy donors behind closed doors. She didn't take any money from Washington lobbyists or PACs.

And we still hit our goal. That's because grassroots donors are building a grassroots movement to change the way campaigns are funded. And that's a big part of how we'll change who government works for.

_**What Comes Next?**_

People like you across the country will keep joining the fight and growing our movement.

They'll walk through snow and freezing rain to knock on more neighbors' doors. They'll stop by their local campaign office for a couple of hours after work to make phone calls. They'll text their friends about how Elizabeth's plans will make a difference in their lives, and they'll commit to fighting side by side to make them happen -- to use their power in our democracy.

As Elizabeth put it in her big speech on New Year's Eve, it's time to imagine the America we can build together. An America where the decisions made in Washington aren't bought and paid for by big lobbyists and big donors. Where the NRA, big drug companies, and the insurance industry don't call the shots. Where everyone has a chance to succeed:

_"If you can imagine all this -- if you can imagine that something better lies on the other side of the chaos and ugliness of the last three years -- then you are more than halfway there. The first step is to see it. The next step is to fight for it." - Elizabeth_
That next step comes down to us. **We need to fight for the big, structural change we believe in. And every hour and every day this month, we'll need to reach more caucus-goers and voters, and we'll get more people invested in this fight.**

**[A year ago, we'd just launched this campaign. A year from now, we can call Elizabeth the president-elect of the United States -- if we all do our part to make it happen. Please chip in to keep up the fight in these critical last few weeks before people start voting.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b8e1/45c30650/1eb4b690e/66fc74c1/2110498876/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjA5Rl9STFRfU1RSX0NfMjAyMDAxMDNfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN09F_RLT_STR_C_20200103_V1S1_P")**

Thanks so much for everything. Hope to see you on the road soon. -roger

Roger Lau

clean_body: We shared that we were still a good chunk behind our third quarter fundraising and set a goal of $20 million goal by December 31... | | | "" A few days before Tuesday's quarterly FEC fundraising report, we leveled with you. We shared that we were still a good chunk behind our third quarter fundraising and set a goal of $20 million goal by December 31, which was what we'd need to raise to keep our plans on track. Well today, I'm excited to share some great news with you. Thanks to supporters like you who stepped up and chipped in, we beat our goal and raised more than $21.2 million in the fourth quarter of 2019. And we saw a strong surge of support at the end -- over $1.5 million came in on the last day of the year alone, our best fundraising day to date. Team Warren is ready to dream big, fight hard, and win. Thank you, thank you, thank you. I'll dig deeper into the numbers in just a sec, but first, I've got a quick and important plug. We hit our goal for 2019, but it's 2020 now, and we've got new, must-hit daily targets. Money we raise every day in January will get sent straight into connecting with voters and caucus-goers, and the first votes are just a few weeks away. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Okay, back to the numbers! More than 443,000 people made almost 900,000 donations to help raise over $21.2 million in October, November, and December Our average contribution was just $23 That means in 2019, nearly 1 million donors gave more than 2.7 million contributions to raise more than $71 million. Who Made It Happen? Grassroots donors. Elizabeth didn't host any private events to raise money from wealthy donors behind closed doors. She didn't take any money from Washington lobbyists or PACs. And we still hit our goal. That's because grassroots donors are building a grassroots movement to change the way campaigns are funded. And that's a big part of how we'll change who government works for. What Comes Next? People like you across the country will keep joining the fight and growing our movement. They'll walk through snow and freezing rain to knock on more neighbors' doors. They'll stop by their local campaign office for a couple of hours after work to make phone calls. They'll text their friends about how Elizabeth's plans will make a difference in their lives, and they'll commit to fighting side by side to make them happen -- to use their power in our democracy. As Elizabeth put it in her big speech on New Year's Eve, it's time to imagine the America we can build together. An America where the decisions made in Washington aren't bought and paid for by big lobbyists and big donors. Where the NRA, big drug companies, and the insurance industry don't call the shots. Where everyone has a chance to succeed: "If you can imagine all this -- if you can imagine that something better lies on the other side of the chaos and ugliness of the last three years -- then you are more than halfway there. The first step is to see it. The next step is to fight for it." - Elizabeth That next step comes down to us. We need to fight for the big, structural change we believe in. And every hour and every day this month, we'll need to reach more caucus-goers and voters, and we'll get more people invested in this fight. ""** Thanks so much for everything. Hope to see you on the road soon. -roger Roger Lau Campaign Manager Warren for President "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Wendy Davis
subject: URGENT: Latest threat to Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
Thirty-nine sitting Republican senators signed an amicus brief asking the Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade
| | | [](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a81/704929dc/1609af16/399392d9/3181155177/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2RmY19lbWFpbCMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azctc3UtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email#?refcode=jtk7-su-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")
---
Friend,

Thirty-nine sitting Republican senators signed an amicus brief asking the Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade. They were joined by 168 members of the House, including my opponent, Chip Roy. In fact - and this likely won't come as a surprise to you - the overwhelming majority of the signers were men.
This is just the latest of Chip Roy's relentless attacks on women's health care. He said he'll fight to ban all abortion access and defund Planned Parenthood completely. **It makes me wonder if he 's ever once stopped to consider that maybe women know more about our reproductive health than he does.**
Back in 2013, when I filibustered an anti-abortion bill in the Texas Senate, a lot of women shared their deeply personal stories with me to fill the 13 hours we spent fighting to block that legislation. Those women used their voices in a powerful way, and they haven't stopped - because it's clear that Republican lawmakers are determined to use any means they can to take away our reproductive freedoms.
**That 's why, with every attack on a woman's right to make these deeply personal decisions for herself, we can never be silent. I'm looking for another 10,000 folks to speak out, right now:**
**Should Roe v. Wade be left alone?**
| | | [YES](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-supporter_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk7-su-nd")
---
| [NO](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-supporter_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk7-su-nd")
---
Thanks for speaking out - no matter who wishes you'd be quiet. Abortion care is health care. It's personal. And it must be protected.

Wendy
| If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can **[click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a81/704929dc/1609af16/399392db/3181155177/VEsC/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter")**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a81/704929dc/1609af16/399392da/3181155177/VEsD/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails"). body:
When there are five frontrunners, there are no frontrunners

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5459%2E377263%2EIxeOxE) Yang Gang --

Andrew says it all the time: When you have five frontrunners, you really have no frontrunners.

A new article in the Des Moines Register just confirmed what we already know: **This nomination is completely up for grabs.**

The article cites a poll that shows that 63% of Iowans haven’t made up their minds yet on who they’ll support. That’s huge! And it’s proof that we are living in one of those rare moments in history in which what we do _right now_ can have a profound impact on the future of our country.

**Here’s the truth:** We raised a lot of money in Q4 -- more than all but four other candidates in the race. But that means will still trail the other four frontrunners -- Joe Biden, Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, and Pete Buttigieg.

**[They see the same polling that we do. They’re going after the same undecided Iowans we are. So we need to level the playing field. **IMPORTANT UPDATE, friend: Betsy DeVos' family is trying to buy Michigan's Senate seat for our right-wing Trump-backed opponent:**
[](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da924/5721a3ed/704827f1/efb4c51/4215824177/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsyMzUtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk235-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")
And that's not all: Out-of-state, conservative billionaires have spent nearly $1 million, all to help buy Michigan's Senate seat for a candidate who supports Trump "2,000%."

**And guess what? It's _working_****. **A recent poll shows Gary **_TIED_** with his extremist opponent.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Join the fight to restore Voting Rights Act protections!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, In the midst of the impeachment hearings, Nancy Pelosi showed the country what real leadership looks like: She, along with Reps. John Lewis and Terri Sewell, passed a landmark voting rights bill, the Voting Rights Advancement Act (VRAA), which would restore voting rights and election protections gutted by the conservatives on the Supreme Court. BUT Mitch McConnell's waiting to kill the bill in the Senate. Republicans don't want more people to vote. They know that when people vote, the GOP loses. subject: Predictions for 2020
body:
Check your calendar – it’s now 2020. But I don’t need a calendar to tell me that we’ve entered another action-packed year for Indiana politics... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/predictions-for-2020?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_Predictions for 2020_** Check your calendar – it’s now 2020. But I don’t need a calendar to tell me that we’ve entered another action-packed year for Indiana politics.

Here’s a few of my predictions on what we have to look forward to in Indiana in 2020: **1.) President Trump will shine in Indiana**
Indiana is Trump Country, and in 11 months, I predict we’ll again be the first state on the board for **President Trump** and **Vice President Pence**! The U.S. has now seen wage growth above 3% for the last 16 months, while the unemployment rate sits at a 50-year low. There’s no doubt that**President Trump** is delivering real results, and Hoosiers will respond when they go to the ballot box.

**2.) Governor Holcomb will lead an unprecedented, winning campaign**
He means it when he says that he’s Putting People First. It’s the centerpiece of **Governor Holcomb’s** campaign, and this year, you’ll see Hoosiers from ALL 92 counties and all walks of life coming together to tell a story about how we’re making Indiana an even greater place to call home...with more good jobs, better health, and wider opportunities. And that will lead to another victory in November, and four more years of results for Hoosiers.

**3.) More Hoosiers will choose Republican leadership in local government, in the General Assembly, and in Congress**
Hoosiers are living the benefits of Republican leadership in all levels of government \-- local, state and federal. In fact, today we hold we hold 89% of county commissioner seats. This November, I predict that Hoosiers will continue to choose Republicans to lead, with big wins for our members of Congress (including a new member in the 5th District), our supermajorities in the Indiana House and Senate, and at our county courthouses throughout the state.

**4.) Governor Holcomb will drive a bold 2020 Next Level Agenda**
Just because he’s running for re-election doesn’t mean he’ll stop delivering results. With the legislative session starting next week _(and the State of the State coming on January 14)_ , you can expect to see a bold agenda from **Governor Holcomb** in 2020, including supporting our teachers, promoting health care pricing transparency, and making our roads safer.

Of course, none of this will be easy. Between now and November, it’s going to take hard work – whether that’s knocking on doors, making calls, talking to your friends and neighbors, sharing our posts on social media, or [chipping in a few dollars](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6b17735784&e=1acd9bb3d6). I’d really encourage you to [join us for Congress of Counties](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a0fa82d9a8&e=1acd9bb3d6) at the end of the month to learn more about what’s next and to continue to build the skills necessary for victory ([learn more and register here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f9bad62f4c&e=1acd9bb3d6)).

We’ll need the full team at work to turn these predictions into reality. But I know we can make it happen.

Happy 2020...now let’s get to work!

-Kyle Hupfer

This morning we announced our Q4 fundraising numbers -- together, our grassroots movement raised $21.2 million to fund this campaign for big, structural change.

And we did it the right way: without hosting any private events to raise money from wealthy donors behind closed doors, and without taking any money from Washington lobbyists or PACs.

**This is a huge win. But Bernie Sanders, Pete Buttigieg, and Joe Biden all raised more. And we need to start closing the gap.**

More money right now means more resources to connect with more voters and caucus-goers during this final stretch of the primary election. With just one month until the Iowa Caucus, we can't afford to fall short right now.

**[Joe Biden raised $1.5 million more than us. Can you chip in $2 or anything you can today to help close the gap? This is the most critical period of time in this primary, and Elizabeth needs a surge of support to help fund our organizing and advertising efforts in these last few weeks before Iowa.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b814/45c30650/1eb1ff107/66fc6240/3968449753/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjEyRl9FR1JfTlVNX1FfMjAyMDAxMDNfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN12F_EGR_NUM_Q_20200103_V1S3_P")**

>
When Elizabeth made the decision to pass up the traditional ways of fundraising -- relying on closed-door fundraisers and PAC money -- she knew we would be outraised by other candidates.

She also knew that the power of grassroots support is real -- and far more meaningful than any wine cave fundraiser or PAC donation.

Now that 2020 has begun, we're kicking things into high gear. We've got great momentum, but starting the year behind other campaigns means that we really need to pick up the pace in the weeks to come.

**[Elizabeth's relying on you to help close this fundraising gap. Please make a contribution of any amount right now to help this campaign keep fighting.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b814/45c30650/1eb1ff107/66fc6240/3968449753/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjEyRl9FR1JfTlVNX1FfMjAyMDAxMDNfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN12F_EGR_NUM_Q_20200103_V1S3_P")**

We can win. And when we do, we'll look back and know it was because grassroots supporters like you pitched in during moments like this to fight for the big, structural change we believe in.

Thanks for all that you do,

Team Warren
